parameters.query:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        XDMDRQ.XNUM_0          AS num_demande,
        XDMDRQ.XDAT_0          AS date_document,
        XDMDRQ.XCOD_0          AS code,
        XDMDRQ.XMAT_0          AS matricule,
        XDMDRQ.XNOM_0          AS nom_prenom,
        XDMDRQ.XDATE_0         AS date_embauche,
        XDMDRQ.XFONC_0         AS fonction,
        XDMDRQ.CREDATTIM_0     AS date_creation,
        XDMDRQ.YDATCON_0       AS date_controle,
        XDMDRQ.CREUSR_0        AS user_createur,

        CASE 
            WHEN XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL THEN XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0
            ELSE YSALAUS.XSAL_0
        END AS code_createur,
        CASE 
            WHEN XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL THEN XSAL_DIRECT.XNAMSAL_0
            ELSE XSAL.XNAMSAL_0
        END AS nom_createur,
        CASE 
            WHEN XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL THEN XSAL_DIRECT.XPRENOM_0
            ELSE XSAL.XPRENOM_0
        END AS prenom_createur,
        CASE 
            WHEN XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL THEN XSAL_DIRECT.XEMAIL_0
            ELSE XSAL.XEMAIL_0
        END AS email_createur,
        CASE 
            WHEN XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL THEN XSAL_DIRECT.YTELE_0
            ELSE XSAL.YTELE_0
        END AS tel_createur,
        CASE 
            WHEN XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL THEN XSAL_DIRECT.YSUP_0
            ELSE XSAL.YSUP_0
        END AS sup_createur,

        XSAL_SUP.XSAL_0        AS code_superieur,
        XSAL_SUP.XNAMSAL_0     AS nom_superieur,
        XSAL_SUP.XPRENOM_0     AS prenom_superieur,
        XSAL_SUP.XEMAIL_0      AS email_superieur,
        XSAL_SUP.YTELE_0       AS tel_superieur,

        pdg.code_pdg,
        pdg.nom_pdg,
        pdg.prenom_pdg,
        pdg.email_pdg,
        pdg.telephone_pdg,

        dga.code_dga,
        dga.nom_dga,
        dga.prenom_dga,
        dga.email_dga,
        dga.telephone_dga,

        farhat.code_farhat,
        farhat.nom_farhat,
        farhat.prenom_farhat,
        farhat.email_farhat,
        farhat.telephone_farhat,

        baallah.code_baallah,
        baallah.nom_baallah,
        baallah.prenom_baallah,
        baallah.email_baallah,
        baallah.telephone_baallah,

        -- ═══ INFOS TELEGRAM ═══

        -- Créateur
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf 
         WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = CASE WHEN XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL THEN XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0 ELSE YSALAUS.XSAL_0 END) AS chat_id_createur,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf 
         WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = CASE WHEN XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL THEN XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0 ELSE YSALAUS.XSAL_0 END) AS langue_createur,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf 
         WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = CASE WHEN XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL THEN XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0 ELSE YSALAUS.XSAL_0 END) AS bot_createur,

        -- Supérieur
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = XSAL_SUP.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = XSAL_SUP.XSAL_0) AS langue_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = XSAL_SUP.XSAL_0) AS bot_superieur,

        -- PDG (chat_id fixe)
        '8528101210' AS chat_id_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0  FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.code_pdg) AS langue_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.code_pdg) AS bot_pdg,

        -- DGA
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.code_dga)     AS chat_id_dga,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.code_dga)     AS langue_dga,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.code_dga)     AS bot_dga,

        -- FARHAT
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.code_farhat)  AS chat_id_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.code_farhat)  AS langue_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.code_farhat)  AS bot_farhat,

        -- BAALLAH
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.code_baallah) AS chat_id_baallah,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.code_baallah) AS langue_baallah,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.code_baallah) AS bot_baallah,

        CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT) AS delai_int,

        CASE 
            WHEN XDMDRQ.YDATCON_0 != '1753-01-01' 
                THEN XDMDRQ.YDATCON_0
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), XDMDRQ.CREDATTIM_0)
        END AS date_limite,

        DATEDIFF(DAY, XDMDRQ.CREDATTIM_0, GETDATE()) AS jours_depuis_creation,

        CASE 
            WHEN XDMDRQ.YDATCON_0 != '1753-01-01'
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), XDMDRQ.YDATCON_0)
            ELSE DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), 
                     DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), XDMDRQ.CREDATTIM_0))
        END AS jours_restants,

        CASE 
            WHEN XDMDRQ.YDATCON_0 != '1753-01-01'
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, XDMDRQ.CREDATTIM_0, XDMDRQ.YDATCON_0) / 2
            ELSE CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT) / 2
        END AS seuil_dga

    FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[XDMDRQ] XDMDRQ

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL XSAL_DIRECT
        ON XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0 = XDMDRQ.CREUSR_0
    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.YSALAUS YSALAUS 
        ON YSALAUS.USER_0 = XDMDRQ.CREUSR_0
    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL XSAL 
        ON XSAL.XSAL_0 = YSALAUS.XSAL_0
    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL XSAL_SUP
        ON XSAL_SUP.XSAL_0 = 
            CASE 
                WHEN XSAL_DIRECT.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL THEN XSAL_DIRECT.YSUP_0
                ELSE XSAL.YSUP_0
            END

    CROSS APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 VALEUR_0 
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.ADOVAL 
        WHERE PARAM_0 = 'YDELXDMDRQ'
    ) P
    CROSS APPLY (
        SELECT 
            XSAL_0 AS code_pdg, XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_pdg,
            XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_pdg, XEMAIL_0 AS email_pdg, YTELE_0 AS telephone_pdg
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0066'
    ) pdg
    CROSS APPLY (
        SELECT 
            XSAL_0 AS code_dga, XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_dga,
            XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_dga, XEMAIL_0 AS email_dga, YTELE_0 AS telephone_dga
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0949'
    ) dga
    CROSS APPLY (
        SELECT 
            XSAL_0 AS code_farhat, XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_farhat,
            XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_farhat, XEMAIL_0 AS email_farhat, YTELE_0 AS telephone_farhat
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S1602'
    ) farhat
    CROSS APPLY (
        SELECT 
            XSAL_0 AS code_baallah, XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_baallah,
            XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_baallah, XEMAIL_0 AS email_baallah, YTELE_0 AS telephone_baallah
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0179'
    ) baallah

    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[AOBJTXT] AOBJTXT
        WHERE XDMDRQ.XNUM_0 = AOBJTXT.IDENT1_0 
          AND AOBJTXT.ABREV_0 = 'XDMDRQ'
    )
    AND CAST(XDMDRQ.CREDATTIM_0 AS DATE) >= '2024-01-01'
)

SELECT *, 'SALARIE'   AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'SUPERIEUR' FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 3
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'FARHAT'    FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= 8  AND jours_restants > 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'BAALLAH'   FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= seuil_dga AND jours_restants > 8
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'DGA'       FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= seuil_dga AND jours_restants > 8
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'PDG'       FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= 2

ORDER BY jours_restants ASC;
